skills.name: dw-demo-base
skills.description: Foundation skill for Dynamicweb 10 demos — scaffolds the dw10-suite host, wires Backend MCP and the localhost TLS bypass, and drops the customisations and customer-context guardrails.

skills.name: dw-demo-erp
skills.description: Dynamicweb 10 ERP integration -- owns the always-on rule that an ERP is a source AND target in DW10's Integration Framework, never a `ShopType=3` channel or an `EcomFeed`.

skills.name: dw-demo-pim
skills.description: Dynamicweb 10 PIM modelling -- starts from a blank/fresh DB, building product data from scratch via MCP (no baseline deserialize).

skills.name: dw-demo-swift
skills.description: Dynamicweb 10 Swift 2 frontend demos — baseline content deserialize, templates, paragraph types, Visual Editor, asset organisation, the customer-center playbook, and the customer re-skin ladder.

skills.name: dw-extend-mcp-tools
skills.description: Step-by-step guide for adding new MCP tools to the Dynamicweb MCP project — tool classes, services, models, and route handlers.

skills.name: dw-integration-bc
skills.description: Dynamicweb 10 live "PIM for Business Central connector" demos -- expose the local DW host publicly via ngrok so a real BC tenant can call the connector's `/admin/api/BC*` surface.

skills.name: dw-setup-install
skills.description: Install Dynamicweb Swift 2 from scratch — download and import the database, extract files, install the temporary MCP add-ins payload, and write the first-run bootstrap manifest.

skills.name: dw-setup-upgrade
skills.description: Manage Dynamicweb 10 version upgrades and migration mechanics.

skills.name: dw-swift-building
skills.description: Customize an existing Swift 2 Dynamicweb site for a specific business without rebuilding it — preserve the working page shell and update area, navigation, category pages, and item values.

skills.name: dw-commerce-b2b
skills.description: Implement B2B patterns including customer groups, scoped assortments, and sales workflows.

skills.name: dw-commerce-catalog
skills.description: Render product catalogs and assortments in Dynamicweb 10.

skills.name: dw-commerce-orders
skills.description: Handle orders, checkout, and cart functionality in Dynamicweb 10.

skills.name: dw-content-modelling
skills.description: Design item types, paragraphs, and content models in Dynamicweb 10.

skills.name: dw-data-access
skills.description: Choose appropriate data-access patterns and optimize caching in Dynamicweb 10.

skills.name: dw-extend-csharp-api
skills.description: Use the Dynamicweb 10 C# API and Services layer for custom backend code.

skills.name: dw-extend-providers
skills.description: Build providers, notification subscribers, and AddIns for Dynamicweb 10.

skills.name: dw-extend-scheduled-tasks
skills.description: Create and manage scheduled tasks in Dynamicweb 10 including RunSqlScheduledTaskAddIn.

skills.name: dw-headless-delivery
skills.description: Build decoupled frontends using the Dynamicweb 10 /dwapi/ delivery API.

skills.name: dw-integration-erp
skills.description: Configure ERP connectors and data ownership in Dynamicweb 10.

skills.name: dw-integration-framework
skills.description: Understand Dynamicweb 10 Integration Framework architecture and patterns.

skills.name: dw-pim-completeness
skills.description: Configure Dynamicweb 10 product completeness — completion rules, completeness scoring, and query-driven automatic workflows.

skills.name: dw-pim-localization
skills.description: Manage product translation and localization across EcomLanguages in Dynamicweb 10.

skills.name: dw-pim-modelling
skills.description: Model Dynamicweb 10 PIM data — Data Models, category fields, variant groups, and global vs category field storage.

skills.name: dw-pim-workflow
skills.description: Configure Dynamicweb 10 PIM workflows — named states, transitions, and editorial handoffs across the product enrichment lifecycle.

skills.name: dw-render-razor
skills.description: Build template hierarchies and Razor patterns in Dynamicweb 10 — the foundation for all rendering.

skills.name: dw-render-templatetags
skills.description: Build templates using TemplateTags to access content properties directly in Dynamicweb 10.

skills.name: dw-render-viewmodels
skills.description: Fetch and shape content using ViewModels in Dynamicweb 10 templates.

skills.name: dw-search-indexing
skills.description: Build and configure Dynamicweb 10 search indexes on Lucene — index types, builders, analyzers, scoring, and product index setup.

skills.name: dw-setup-config
skills.description: Configure Dynamicweb 10 environment and connection settings.

skills.name: dw-source-explorer
skills.description: Browse Dynamicweb source code on GitHub to understand internal APIs, classes, extension points, and patterns.

skills.name: dw-users-permissions
skills.description: Manage users, groups, and the Permission entity store in Dynamicweb 10.
